article.title: 🚀 Uber Referral Opportunity 🚀
article.content:
Hi all,
If anyone is looking for a referral at `Uber`, feel free to drop the following details in the comments:
- Resume
- Years of Experience (YOE)
- A brief summary about yourself
- LinkedIn profile link (Optional)

I'll review and connect with you on LinkedIn if there's a potential match. Good luck to everyone applying!

post.content: Hi I am interested in the opportunity - connect with me on linkedin (link in the profile)
Sir is there any opportunity for freshers..?
Do they have a development office in London?
